results.alt:
ARTITECT MACHINERY was founded by a small group of toolmakers
              who believed sheet metal folding deserved the same attention to
              detail as fine architecture. Today, our machines stand in
              workshops, factories and panel lines across more than forty
              countries. Quietly building the world's most considered folders. industrial metal workshop precision engineering

A double folder uses two folding beams — one above the sheet, one
            below — so operators can bend up and down in a single setup. The
            result is dramatically reduced cycle times on complex parts like
            architectural panels, enclosures, and HVAC sections. One sheet. Two directions. Zero re-clamping. double folder bending metal sheet close up
